channel.title: Lx8 Labs — Insights
channel.description: Field notes from the lab. DevOps post-mortems, AI experiments, paper breakdowns. Once or twice a month.
channel.copyright: © 2013–2026 Lx8 Labs · Founded by Alexei Ferreira

item.title: 13 years of DevOps consulting: eight lessons
item.dc:creator: Alexei Ferreira
item.description: What I'd tell my 2013 self about running a one-person DevOps consultancy. Sell outcomes, charge for thinking, hire your replacement — and seven more.

item.title: Building a 3D algorithm visualizer in pure HTML
item.dc:creator: Alexei Ferreira
item.description: How a single 2,000-line HTML file with Three.js + 350 lines of CSS turned into a 39-algorithm visualizer with synchronized code highlighting. The case for constraints over frameworks.
